response.justification: Candidate significantly exceeds the 6+ years experience bar with ~15 years across full-stack roles, and the current role at re:cinq directly covers TypeScript/Node.js plus AI-agent infrastructure (MCP) which maps tightly to the JD. Strong testing culture (TDD workshops, Selenium course, Fluent-Asserts) aligns with the Vitest/quality expectations, and React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/K8s, and Java are all present. Gaps around explicit Nest.js, Vitest, and Python keep this short of a perfect score, and the resume leans heavily on DLang in earlier roles, but the recent stack and AI-agent experience make this a clear interview.
strengths: Direct AI-agent / MCP experience at current role
Deep TypeScript/Node.js + React + MongoDB + AWS background
Strong testing and craftsmanship track record (TDD, CI/CD, workshops)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest mentioned
Python not listed in skills despite JD asking for it
Education timeline (MIT 2009-2012 overlapping concurrent jobs in Europe) needs clarification
